headline: What Henry Samueli’s Record Broadcom Sale Signals For AVGO Shareholders
summary: Broadcom co‑founder and Director Henry Samueli reported a record insider sale of NasdaqGS:AVGO shares in a March 27 SEC filing. The transaction occurred shortly before a clear decline in Broadcom's share price. Large insider sales by founding executives often draw attention from investors who watch for potential shifts in sentiment or personal liquidity moves. Broadcom enters this development with a current share price of $313.49 and a very large 5‑year return of about 7x. Over the past...

headline: VYMI vs. VIG vs. VYM: Which Vanguard Dividend ETF Pays You Most?
summary: Income-focused investors often look to dividend ETFs as an easy way to generate steady passive income without picking individual stocks. Among Vanguard’s most popular options are the Vanguard High Dividend Yield ETF (VYM), Vanguard Dividend Appreciation ETF (VIG), and Vanguard International High Dividend Yield ETF (VYMI)—each offering a different mix of yield, growth, and global exposure. headline: What Broadcom (AVGO)'s AI Surge and US$970 Million DISA Deal Means For Shareholders
summary: In March 2026, Broadcom reported Q1 results ahead of expectations, highlighted very large growth in AI semiconductor revenue, and, together with Carahsoft, secured a five-year, US$970 million blanket purchase agreement from the Defense Information Systems Agency to streamline software procurement across key U.S. Department of War agencies. These developments reinforce Broadcom’s dual identity as both an AI hardware supplier and a growing infrastructure software provider with expanding...

headline: Broadcom Announces Planned Chief Financial Officer Transition
summary: Broadcom Inc. (Nasdaq: AVGO), a global technology leader that designs, develops and supplies semiconductor and infrastructure software solutions, today announced the appointment of Amie Thuener as Chief Financial Officer of Broadcom, effective June 12, 2026. This appointment follows the retirement of Kirsten M. Spears as Chief Financial Officer, who will continue in her role until that time and will serve as an advisor for nine months to ensure a smooth transition.

content.title: Broadcom Announces Planned Chief Financial Officer Transition
content.summary: Broadcom Inc. (Nasdaq: AVGO), a global technology leader that designs, develops and supplies semiconductor and infrastructure software solutions, today announced the appointment of Amie Thuener as Chief Financial Officer of Broadcom, effective June 12, 2026. This appointment follows the retirement of Kirsten M. Spears as Chief Financial Officer, who will continue in her role until that time and will serve as an advisor for nine months to ensure a smooth transition.

headline: Broadcom taps Alphabet executive Amie Thuener as next CFO
summary: U.S. chip designer Broadcom on Thursday named Alphabet executive Amie Thuener as its ‌next finance chief, effective June 12, when incumbent ‌Kirsten Spears retires. Thuener is currently Alphabet's vice president, corporate controller and ​chief accounting officer. In the past, she has also served as a managing director at PricewaterhouseCoopers, overseeing transaction and accounting advisory services.

content.title: Broadcom taps Alphabet executive Amie Thuener as next CFO
content.summary: U.S. chip designer Broadcom on Thursday named Alphabet executive Amie Thuener as its ‌next finance chief, effective June 12, when incumbent ‌Kirsten Spears retires. In the past, she has also served as a managing director at PricewaterhouseCoopers, overseeing transaction and accounting advisory services.
